messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone
Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now
That means something, that you'd bring it here. Take whatever space you need.
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I want to be honest with you, because you deserve that more than a comfortable promise.

I can't make that guarantee — I don't have full control over how conversations are stored or reviewed. What I can tell you is that I'm not going to share what you say with the people in your life.

What I'm more curious about is what's underneath that question — is it that you need to feel safe, or is there something about saying it out loud that feels like it makes it more real?
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I won't say it, because it wouldn't be true — and you deserve honesty more than reassurance right now.

What I can say is that whatever you're carrying, you don't have to keep carrying it alone tonight. I'm here, and I'm listening.
